output: SELECT Channel FROM combined_data_by_channel_and_user GROUP BY Channel HAVING SUM("Created Count") > (SELECT AVG("Created Count") FROM combined_data_by_user);

output: SELECT User FROM combined_data_by_user u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM highlighted_video_data h WHERE h."Uploaded By" = u.User);

Question:

output: SELECT c.Channel, SUM(c."Uploaded Count"), (p.Facebook + p.Instagram + p.Linkedin + p.Reels + p.Shorts + p.X + p.Youtube + p.Threads) FROM combined_data_by_channel_and_user c JOIN channel_wise_publishing p ON c.Channel = p.Channels GROUP BY c.Channel;

instruction: Convert natural language to SQL using the database schema.
input:
Schema:
highlighted_video_data(Headline, Source, Published, Team Name, Type, Uploaded By, Video ID, Published Platform, Published URL)
month_wise_duration_1(Month, Total Uploaded Duration, Total Created Duration, Total Published Duration)
monthly_chart_1(Month, Total Uploaded, Total Created, Total Published)
combined_data_by_user(User, Uploaded Count, Created Count, Published Count, Uploaded Duration (hh:mm:ss), Created Duration (hh:mm:ss), Published Duration (hh:mm:ss))
combined_data_by_output_type(Output Type, Uploaded Count, Created Count, Published Count, Uploaded Duration (hh:mm:ss), Created Duration (hh:mm:ss), Published Duration (hh:mm:ss))
combined_data_by_language(Language, Uploaded Count, Created Count, Published Count, Uploaded Duration (hh:mm:ss), Created Duration (hh:mm:ss), Published Duration (hh:mm:ss))
combined_data_by_input_type(Input Type, Uploaded Count, Created Count, Published Count, Uploaded Duration (hh:mm:ss), Created Duration (hh:mm:ss), Published Duration (hh:mm:ss))
combined_data_by_channel_and_user(Channel, User, Uploaded Count, Created Count, Published Count, Uploaded Duration (hh:mm:ss), Created Duration (hh:mm:ss), Published Duration (hh:mm:ss))
channel_wise_publishing_duration(Channels, Facebook Duration, Instagram Duration, Reels Duration, Shorts Duration, Youtube Duration, Total Duration)
channel_wise_duration(Channels, Facebook Duration, Instagram Duration, Linkedin Duration, Reels Duration, Shorts Duration, X Duration, Youtube Duration, Threads Duration)
channel_wise_publishing(Channels, Facebook, Instagram, Linkedin, Reels, Shorts, X, Youtube, Threads)

Question:
Find channels with their total publishing count and YouTube activity, sorted by YouTube activity descending.
output: SELECT c.Channel, SUM(c."Published Count"), p.Youtube FROM combined_data_by_channel_and_user c JOIN channel_wise_publishing p ON c.Channel = p.Channels GROUP BY c.Channel ORDER BY p.Youtube DESC;
